name: song-builder-templates
note: M-13 g1 TEMPLATE-SUGGESTED SECTIONS (the M-12 -> M-13 payoff). Persona at 412x915: build a Verse (C-F-G), Add as Verse, then Clear the canvas. The buffer is non-empty + the progression is empty, so the SONG tray now offers proven-progression chips (SongTemplates.forSection) realized in the song's key. Switch the suggestion label to Chorus, tap the first chip -> the progression fills through the chord-add path (slots > 0, A3 clear-undo invalidated) and the add-row label is pre-set to Chorus. Add as Chorus, Assemble -> the song view shows BOTH Verse + Chorus headers. Red-first: #songSuggest does not exist on unmodified main, so step 12 (assertVisible #songSuggest) fails there. GREEN requires song-templates.js wired into play/index.html + sw.js CORE (a coupled parent merge step) so the chips populate.

steps.label: UAT cue: chords present, no sections yet -> start-a-song cue
steps.js: (function(){var c=document.getElementById('songTrayCue');return !!c && !c.hidden && c.textContent.trim()==='Add this as a section to start a song.'})()

steps.label: one buffered Verse, progression NOT cleared (A3)
UAT cue: buffer + chords -> add-more-or-assemble cue
progression empty, tray still visible (buffer non-empty)
UAT cue: buffer + empty canvas -> pick-a-label cue
at least one realized chorus template chip is offered
chip fills the progression (slots > 0) via the chord-add path
A3: the Clear-undo banner is invalidated by the fill
the seeded section carries forward - add-row label pre-set to Chorus
song view shows both section headers (Verse + Chorus)
